ModMetaData.name: RimTweaks by NoAd
ModMetaData.author: NoAd
ModMetaData.description:
Personal compilation mod — cherry-picked features from various mods to avoid installing large mods for a single mechanic.
Features: - Vanilla Autodoor gets door lock policy: Default / Everyone / Only colonists and animals / Only colonists, animals and friendlies / Only drafted - Research "Advanced Autodoor" reduces Autodoor power consumption by 50% (requires Harmony)
